intro.note: Narration starts immediately on the title card. The body fades in under the intro and holds the first recording frame until the search cue.

beats.action: The first Paperless NGX documents frame is held.
beats.narration: Intro and the explanation of normal keyword search.
beats.edit: Freeze a clean first frame; no cursor motion or typing is frozen mid-action.

beats.action: Cursor moves to Paperless search and types fertilizer recommendations.
beats.narration: So if I search for fertilizer recommendations...
beats.edit: Native speed so cursor movement and typing stay natural.

beats.narration: Paperless comes back empty; those records exist under different wording.
beats.edit: Freeze the clean empty-result frame until the narration is ready to introduce Paperless Ag.

beats.action: Paperless Ag project page holds on the initial project overview.
beats.narration: Lead-in before the line: And what Paperless Ag is going to do...
beats.edit: Freeze the clean site-top frame until the narration introduces Paperless Ag.

beats.action: Paperless Ag project page scrolls down to the Claude MCP configuration.
beats.narration: Paperless Ag adds semantic search and shows how Claude connects through MCP.
beats.edit: Slow continuous scroll starting at the first visible movement; stop at the current 01:17 frame.

beats.action: Project page holds on the MCP config block.
beats.narration: The MCP setup remains visible until the switch to Claude.
beats.edit: Freeze the clean frame matching the user reference screenshot; do not scroll farther down the page.

beats.action: Cursor moves to Claude and types the natural-language question.
beats.narration: Now I can ask the question the way I would say it out loud.
beats.edit: Native speed so cursor movement and typing stay natural.

beats.action: Claude works through tool calls and search progress.
beats.narration: Claude calls the Paperless Ag search tool and searches by meaning.

beats.action: Claude answer and fertilizer recommendation table appear.
beats.narration: The right documents are returned without remembering exact titles or product names.

beats.action: Source list and final answer area scroll into the final source view.
beats.narration: Paperless NGX stays stock while Paperless Ag runs beside it.
beats.edit: Mild speed-up until the frame that previously appeared around output 02:13.

beats.action: Final Claude source list frame holds through the outro fade.
beats.narration: Paperless NGX stays stock while Paperless Ag runs beside it.
beats.edit: Freeze the clean final Claude frame until the outro title card fade begins.
